---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the hub site or documentation
title: "[Feature] "
labels: type:feature, status:triage
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

**Which project(s) does this affect?**
- [ ] access-to (hub site)
- [ ] access-to-housing
- [ ] access-to-jobs
- [ ] access-to-health
- [ ] access-to-business
- [ ] access-to-services
- [ ] access-to-education
- [ ] access-to-safety

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links, or other details that would help.
